title: Lazy Sunday Bean Steam
description: A hearty and flavorful pescatarian-friendly bean steam dish featuring Pinto Beans for a comforting and earthy meal perfect for lazy Sundays.
instructions: Soak the pinto beans overnight in water and drain before cooking.
In a large pot, combine soaked pinto beans with 2 cups of water. Bring to a boil then reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for about 45 minutes or until tender.
While the beans are cooking, sauté onion and garlic in olive oil over medium heat for about 3-5 minutes, until translucent.
Add cumin powder and cook for another minute.
Stir in tomato sauce puree, reduce heat to low, and let it simmer for a few more minutes. This mixture will help thicken the bean stew.
Once the beans are cooked and soft, add them into the onion-garlic-cumin-tomato puree mix and stir well to combine evenly.
Transfer the bean stew to an oven-safe dish or pot. Let it cool slightly before serving.
